ddls:
CREATE TABLE "issues" (
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each issue */,
  "issue_name" TEXT /* Name or title of the issue */,
  "component" TEXT /* Component of the library affected by the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue (e.g., minor, major, critical) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the issue */,
  "meeting" TEXT /* Meeting where the issue was discussed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the issue (e.g., None, Complete, Nothing To Do) */,
  "first_released_version" TEXT /* First version in which the issue was resolved or addressed */,
  "labels" TEXT /* Labels associated with the issue */,
  "issue_url" TEXT /* URL to the issue's discussion page */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the issue was last updated */,
  "resolution" TEXT /* Description of how the issue was resolved */,
  "related_issues" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of related issue IDs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("issue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_issues_meeting FOREIGN KEY ("meeting") REFERENCES meetings ("meeting_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "meeting_name" TEXT /* Name of the meeting */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the meeting */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the meeting */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the meeting */,
  "agenda_url" TEXT /* URL to the meeting agenda */,
  "minutes_url" TEXT /* URL to the meeting minutes */,
  "attendees" TEXT /* List of attendees */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, maintainer, contributor) */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization the user belongs to */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "issue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the issue the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "reply_to" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for threaded comments) */,
  "attachment_url" TEXT /* URL to an attachment related to the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_reply_to FOREIGN KEY ("reply_to") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_issue_id FOREIGN KEY ("issue_id") REFERENCES issues ("issue_id")
)
column_names: Name or title of the issue
